## BEAUTY ELIXIRS 

 FROM THE 

 SWISS ALPS

A luxurious skincare experience created with

sustainably sourced alpine flower extracts.

[Shop now](https://valyxir.com/collections/all)

![Image 8](https://valyxir.com/)

### FROM THE ALPS, WITH LOVE

Valyxir is a Swiss skincare brand that draws its effectiveness from the extraordinary properties of alpine flowers.

Based on clinically proven ingredients, our unique formulas hydrate and soothe the skin while offering anti-aging benefits.

[LEARN MORE](https://valyxir.com/pages/about-us)

## Discover what makes us unique

![Image 21](https://valyxir.com/cdn/shop/files/Born-in-switzerland_180x.jpg?v=1755021444%20180w)

### A brand born in the Swiss Alps

All our elixirs are developed and produced in the heart of the Swiss Alps, in Valais.

![Image 23](https://valyxir.com/cdn/shop/files/Swiss-alpine-flowers_180x.jpg?v=1755021523%20180w)

### Rare alpine flowers

Our products are enriched with extracts from sustainably sourced alpine plants. These flowers embody wild beauty and resilience.

![Image 25](https://valyxir.com/cdn/shop/files/best-swiss-skincare_180x.jpg?v=1755021544%20180w)

### Gentle and effective formulas

Unique formulas containing extracts of alpine flowers combined with well-known ingredients such as hyaluronic acid and Q10.

![Image 27](https://valyxir.com/cdn/shop/files/in-house-swiss-laboratory_180x.jpg?v=1755021565%20180w)

### Founder & formulator

Each product is designed and manufactured in our own laboratory. We believe that to create something truly unique, we must do it ourselves.
